title: Coordinate HUD
description: Customizable coordinate display with drag-and-drop positioning, rainbow effects, and extensive styling options. Clean HUD alternative to F3.
body:
# Coordinates HUD

A highly customizable coordinates display mod that provides a clean, feature-rich alternative to the F3 debug screen. Configure every aspect through an intuitive GUI!

## ✨ Key Features

### 🎨 Visual Customization
- **Rainbow Mode** - Animated cycling rainbow colors with adjustable speed
- **Gradient Mode** - Smooth color transitions across display lines
- **Dynamic Colors** - Colors that change based on Y-level, biome, or dimension
- **Text Styling** - Bold, italic, shadow, and outline effects with custom colors
- **Background & Borders** - Fully customizable with opacity, padding, and corner radius
- **Layout Control** - Horizontal or vertical layouts with adjustable spacing and alignment

### 📍 Positioning
- **Drag-and-Drop Editor** - Visual positioning with grid snap and preset guides
- **9 Position Presets** - Top/Middle/Bottom × Left/Center/Right
- **Anchor Points** - 7 anchor modes for responsive HUD placement across screen sizes
- **HUD Scaling** - Scale from 0.5x to 3.0x to fit your preferences

### 📊 Display Options
- **Coordinate Formats** - Labeled, comma-separated, slash-separated, or fully custom
- **Additional Info** - Dimension name, biome, direction (4/8-way, degrees, arrows), light levels, movement speed
- **Nether/Overworld Conversion** - Automatic coordinate conversion
- **Selective Display** - Show/hide X, Y, Z independently with 0-3 decimal places

### ⚙️ Behavior & Performance
- **Visibility Rules** - Auto-hide with F3, in GUI, spectator mode, or specific dimensions
- **Hold-to-Show Mode** - Temporarily display HUD while holding keybind
- **Smooth Transitions** - Fade animations when toggling visibility
- **Smart Caching** - Optimized biome lookups with configurable cache duration
- **Update Frequency** - Adjust from 1-20 ticks for performance vs responsiveness
- **Debug Mode** - Display FPS, update rate, and performance metrics

### 🎛️ Configuration
Access everything through **Mod Menu** with 5 organized tabs:
1. **Display Settings** - What to show and format options
2. **Position & Layout** - HUD placement and visual layout
3. **Colors & Style** - Color customization and special effects
4. **Visibility & Behavior** - When and how the HUD appears
5. **Advanced** - Performance tuning and debug options

Every setting includes helpful tooltips! All keybinds start unbound - configure them in Controls.

## 📦 Requirements

- **Fabric Loader** 0.16.0+
- **Fabric API** (any version)
- **Mod Menu** 11.0.0+
- Cloth Config (bundled - no separate download needed)

## 🆘 Support

Need help? Have suggestions? **[Join our Discord!](https://discord.gg/M5snvUMkQC)** 

**Enjoy your new customizable coordinates HUD!** 🎉
